title: beige book / recession forecasting / sentiment analysis | Research Paper | The Beige Book's Value for Forecasting Recessions
summary: This research paper from the Federal Reserve Bank of Boston investigates whether Beige Book sentiment indexes improve recession forecasting beyond established financial indicators. The authors find that incorporating Beige Book-derived sentiment measures into models using the term spread, lagged term spread, and S&P 500 improves short-term (3-month) recession forecasting. However, the added value is less clear for longer-term (12-month) forecasts. The study also finds that District-level sentiment is more predictive than the national summary, and Beige Book content overlaps with but is not wholly redundant to financial indicators.
